statements: PREPARE p1 FROM SELECT l.c11, r.c21 FROM shellTest l LEFT JOIN shellTest r ON l.c12 = r.c22 AND l.c11 != r.c21 AND r.type = "right" WHERE l.type = "left" AND l.c11 > 2

results.name: p1
results.text: PREPARE p1 FROM SELECT l.c11, r.c21 FROM shellTest l LEFT JOIN shellTest r ON l.c12 = r.c22 AND l.c11 != r.c21 AND r.type = "right" WHERE l.type = "left" AND l.c11 > 2

testcase: Set plan stability mode to PREPARED_ONLY
statements: UPDATE system:settings SET plan_stability.mode = "prepared only"
SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM system:prepareds WHERE persist IS MISSING AND planPreparedTime IS NOT MISSING
SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM QUERY_METADATA._system._query WHERE meta().id LIKE 'ppn::%'
PREPARE p2 FROM SELECT l.c11, r.c21 FROM shellTest l LEFT JOIN shellTest r ON l.c12 = r.c22 AND r.type = "right" WHERE l.type = "left" AND l.c11 > 2 AND r.c21 IS MISSING

results.name: p2
results.text: PREPARE p2 FROM SELECT l.c11, r.c21 FROM shellTest l LEFT JOIN shellTest r ON l.c12 = r.c22 AND r.type = "right" WHERE l.type = "left" AND l.c11 > 2 AND r.c21 IS MISSING

statements: SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM system:prepareds WHERE persist IS MISSING AND planPreparedTime IS NOT MISSING
SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM QUERY_METADATA._system._query WHERE meta().id LIKE 'ppn::%'

testcase: Set plan stability mode to AD_HOC
statements: UPDATE system:settings SET plan_stability.mode = "ad-hoc"
SELECT d.c11 FROM shellTest d JOIN shellTest b ON d.c11 = b.c21 AND b.type = "right" JOIN shellTest c ON d.c11 = c.c21 AND c.type = "right" WHERE d.type = "left" AND d.c11 < 2

testcase: Set plan stability mode to AD_HOC_READ_ONLY
statements: UPDATE system:settings SET plan_stability.mode = "ad_hoc_read_only"
SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM system:prepareds WHERE adHocStatement = true
SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM QUERY_METADATA._system._query WHERE meta().id LIKE 'ppn::%'

testcase: Set plan stability mode to AD_HOC
statements: UPDATE system:settings SET plan_stability.mode = "ad-hoc"
SELECT d.c11 FROM shellTest d JOIN shellTest b ON d.c11 = b.c21 AND b.type = "right" JOIN shellTest c ON d.c11 = c.c21 AND c.type = "right" WHERE d.type = "left" AND d.c11 < 2

testcase: Set plan stability mode to AD_HOC_READ_ONLY
statements: UPDATE system:settings SET plan_stability.mode = "ad_hoc_read_only"
SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM system:prepareds WHERE adHocStatement = true

testcase: Check in-memory cache entry and usage count
statements: SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM system:prepareds WHERE adHocStatement = true AND uses > 1
SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM QUERY_METADATA._system._query WHERE meta().id LIKE 'ppn::%'
SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM QUERY_METADATA._system._query WHERE meta().id LIKE "ppn::%" AND ad_hoc = true

testcase: Set plan stability mode to OFF (via UNSET)
statements: UPDATE system:settings UNSET plan_stability.mode
SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM QUERY_METADATA._system._query WHERE meta().id LIKE 'ppn::%'
